sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28793" key="dusdaimone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσδαιμ-ονέω</orth>, <sense id="n28793.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be wretched</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
